protocol_notes: On GHK-Cu since Sept 25, 2025. Takes zinc supplement in the morning and uses GHK-Cu at night. Some nights forgets dose. Notes actual copper inclusion is relatively nominal at 0.157 mg/1 mg GHK-Cu in standard 1:1 GHK:Cu vial. Prefers single compounds to control own dosages rather than blends. References recommended 2-4:1 TB500:BPC-157 ratios with different schedules.
